zh.Maelor Gymraeg, Wrexham district, Denbig: 英國威爾斯丹比爾萊可哈姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Rhys Moythe於大約1380年出生在英國威爾斯蒙姆爾時，他的父親Rhys Moetha11歲，母親Verch Llewelyn21歲。他於1417年與Margaret deHarley在英國威爾斯蒙姆爾結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.Maelor Gymraeg, Wrexham district, Denbig: 英国威尔斯丹比爾萊可哈姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard Rhys Moythe于大约1380年出生在英国威尔斯蒙姆爾时，他的父亲Rhys Moetha11岁，母亲Verch Llewelyn21岁。他于1417年与Margaret deHarley在英国威尔斯蒙姆爾结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Moythe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Moth
meanings: English (Hampshire and Surrey): nickname from Middle English mothe ‘moth’.
German: unexplained. This surname is rare in Germany.

variants.name: Mott
meanings: English: from the Middle English female personal name Motte, a pet form of Matilda. There has probably been some confusion with Moat .
German: topographic name for someone who lived by or owned property in a marshy area, from Middle High German mot ‘mud, swamp’.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

nameMeanings.name: Rhys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional name meaning ‘ardour’; borne in the Middle Ages by various rulers in south-west Wales, including  Rhys ap Tewdur  (  d. 1093 ) and  Rhys ap Gruffudd  (  1132–97 ).

variants.name: Reece
meanings: Anglicized spelling of Rhys . The name is now in widespread and frequent use outside Wales, in many cases representing a transferred use of the surname so spelled, which is derived from the given name.

variants.name: Rees
meanings: Anglicized spelling of Welsh Rhys, in some cases representing a transferred use of the surname so spelled, which is derived from the Welsh given name.

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Rhys Moythe was born about 1380, in Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Rhys Moetha, was 11 and his mother, Verch Llewelyn, was 21. He married Margaret deHarley in 1417, in Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died in his hometown.

fr.Maelor Gymraeg, Wrexham district, Denbig: Wrexham, Denbighshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Rhys Moythe est né environ 1380, à Monmouthshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Rhys Moetha, avait 11 ans et sa mère, Verch Llewelyn, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Margaret deHarley en 1417, à Monmouthshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard Rhys Moythe um 1380 in Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Rhys Moetha 11 und seine Mutter Verch Llewelyn 21. Er hat 1417 in Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom Margaret deHarley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Rhys Moythe è nato il circa 1380 nel Monmouthshire, Galles, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Rhys Moetha, aveva 11 anni e il suo madre, Verch Llewelyn, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Margaret deHarley nel 1417, nel Monmouthshire, Galles, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard Rhys Moytheが約1380年にイギリスウェールズモンモウスシュアイアで生まれた時，父Rhys Moethaは11歳，母Verch Llewelynは21歳であった。1417年にイギリスウェールズモンモウスシュアイアでMargaret deHarleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Rhys Moythe(이)가 대략 1380년 영국 웨일스 몬모우스실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Rhys Moetha(은)는 11세였고, 그의 어머니 Verch Llewelyn(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1417년 영국 웨일스 몬모우스실르에서 Margaret deHarley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Rhys Moythe nasceu aproximadamente 1380, em Monmouthshire, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Rhys Moetha, tinha 11 anos e sua mãe, Verch Llewelyn, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret deHarley em 1417, em Monmouthshire, Gales, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Rhys Moythe родился около 1380 г. в местности монмоутшир, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Rhys Moetha было 11 лет, а матери, которую звали Verch Llewelyn, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret deHarley в 1417 г. в местности монмоутшир, Уэльс, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер в его родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard Rhys Moythe nació aproximadamente 1380, en Monmouthshire, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Rhys Moetha, tenía 11 años y su mamá, Verch Llewelyn, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Margaret deHarley en 1417, en Monmouthshire, Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en su pueblo.
